entry.title: Neuherbs True Vitamin Men Multivitamin Supplements
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Vitamin Men
Price: 599.00

neuherbs True Multivitamin Men delivers true care for every man — offering complete support of nutrition for balanced body and mind. Formulated as a unique, science-backed multivitamin, it goes beyond basic nutrition with dual support for men’s physical stamina and mental wellbeing. Packed with 22 essential vitamins and minerals, it includes more absorbable forms of Magnesium bisglycinate, Vitamin K2-7, Veg Vitamin D3, and nature-derived Biotin for optimum nourishment and daily vitality. To help manage modern-day stress, it features a powerful Stress-Buster Blend of Ginseng, Safed Musli, Grapeseed Extract, Choline and L-theanine that supports mental clarity and manages mental fatigue. Its Energy Blend aids efficient energy metabolism, enhances strength, and boosts stamina to power everyday performance. Meanwhile, 100% RDA of Vitamin C, E, and Zinc with natural antioxidants strengthens immunity and protects against oxidative stress, and the 
addition of biopiperine helps in better absorption of the nutrients, making this multivitamin more effective.

entry.title: Neuherbs True Vitamin Women Multivitamin Supplements
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Vitamin Women
Price: 599.00

neuherbs Multivitamin for Women is a science-backed multivitamin and multimineral supplement designed to provide complete daily nutrition for energy, beauty, and hormonal balance to women, enhanced with piperine for better absorption. Formulated with 22 essential vitamins providing 100% RDA and minerals in highly bioavailable forms such as Magnesium Bisglycinate, Vitamin K2-7, Veg Vitamin D3, and nature-derived Biotin, it supports the body with optimum nourishment for healthy skin, hair, bone, immunity & overall wellness. The specialized Energy Blend of this multivitamin tablet helps boost energy metabolism and improves the body’s ability to utilize energy efficiently, keeping you active and energized throughout the day. To support beauty from within, neuherbs True Vitamin Women supplement includes a Beauty Blend enriched with Hyaluronic Acid and powerful antioxidants like pomegranate extract, & Isoflavonoids, that help maintain healthy, glowing skin and hair. Additionally, its Daily Wellness Blend features ayurvedic herbs like Shatavari extract, Ginseng, Renuka Beej, and Black cohosh extract that help promote healthy hormonal balance and enhance overall quality of life, making it a holistic multivitamin tailored for women’s everyday needs.

entry.title: Neuherbs True Vitamin D3 Tablets
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True vitamin D3 tablets
Price: 549.00

Experience stronger bones with Vitamin D3 K2 Tablets, for bone strength & healthy immune function, delivering 100% RDA of Vitamin D3 (600 IU) and 55 mcg of Vitamin K2-7 in easy-to-use smaller sized, convenient tablets. This Veg D3 formula features cholecalciferol sourced from lichen—known for its excellent absorption—helping your body make full use of every dose. The combination of Veg Vitamin D3 and highly bioavailable K2-7 (menaquinone) supports superior calcium absorption, allowing your body to utilize calcium more effectively. Together, these nutrients work to promote strong, healthy bones and maintain optimal bone density. Beyond bone support, Vitamin D3 helps sustain everyday immune function, while Vitamin K2-7 assists in directing calcium to the right places in the body, contributing to overall heart and bone wellness. This thoughtful blend offers a well-rounded approach to daily health, helping you maintain vitality, strength, and balanced well-being.

entry.title: Neuherbs Premium Coenzyme Q10 Supplements
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Coenzyme Q-10
Price: 999.00

Experience the power of neuherbs Coenzyme Q-10 Capsules, delivering 200 mg of more absorbable CoQ10—providing 2X more support per serving to promote energy, & heart wellness. CoQ10 supplement fuels the mitochondria, your cells’ natural energy centers, helping maintain daily energy levels and an active lifestyle. The CoQ-10 supplement’s antioxidant properties also help protect heart cells from oxidative stress while supporting the heart’s high energy needs for overall heart well-being. To enhance its benefits, this coenzyme Q-10 formula includes Veg Vitamin D3 and Vitamin E, which work alongside CoQ10 to provide antioxidant support, help reduce free-radical impact, and maintain overall wellness. Piperine is added to improve bioavailability, helping the body absorb nutrients more efficiently for better results. Together, these ingredients create a powerful, well rounded CoQ10 supplement designed to support energy, heart health, and overall vitality in your daily routine

entry.title: Neuherbs Hair Biotin Capsules - DHT Blocker Hair Supplement
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Hair Biotin Capsules
Price: 499.00 - 949.00 (2 variants)

neuherbs Hair Biotin Capsule Supplement for Men and Women is specially formulated to support healthier, stronger hair from within. This hair biotin supplement delivers 100% RDA of biotin—naturally derived from Sesbania—to boost keratin production, strengthen weak strands, and promote visible hair growth, making it one of the best biotin supplements for daily use.
To ensure maximum nutrient absorption, it contains probiotic with 10 billion CFU that enhance gut health, helping your body absorb essential nutrients more effectively for improved hair and scalp nourishment. The formula also includes five natural DHT blockers, such as pumpkin seed and green tea extracts, known to reduce follicle shrinking and manage hair thinning from the roots—ideal for those seeking DHT blocker capsules for hair fall control.
Its dual-action blend combines the growth-promoting power of biotin with hair fall reducing benefits of DHT blockers. Added lycopene, a powerful antioxidant, protects hair cells from oxidative stress, keeping your scalp healthy —making it one of the best biotin for hair growth.

entry.title: True Vitamin Women 30 Tablets & Skin Collagen Booster 210 g Combo

Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Multivitamin Tablets
Price: 1299.00

Indulge in your wellness with our True Vitamin Women and Collagen Booster Combo. This comprehensive package combines the power of our True Vitamin Multivitamin Tablets for women and Skin Collagen Booster 210g, providing essential nutrients and support for your overall health and beauty. Our Multivitamin Tablets offer a carefully balanced blend of vitamins and minerals to nourish your body, boost energy levels, and strengthen your reproductive system. Meanwhile, our Skin Collagen Booster is packed with plant-based collagen boosters to promote healthy skin, hair, and nails. With regular use, you can experience improved skin elasticity, reduced wrinkles, and enhanced youthfulness. Our products are made with high-quality ingredients and are free from artificial additives, ensuring optimal results. So, invest in your well-being and discover the transformative power with our True Vitamin Combo — helping you glow both inside and out.

neuherbs True Vitamin & Ashwagandha 1000 Plus combo allows you to enjoy various health benefits like increased energy, immunity and performance while also filling a major gap in your nutritional profile that might exist owing to the lifestyle brought upon us by various changes of the modern world. neuherbs True Vitamin Multivitamin tablets are unique in their ingredients —- bringing to you the goodness of 27 essential ingredients that provide several health benefits to your body. It is infused with several essential nutrients and herbs like Ginseng, to help its efficacy and bring to you a 360-degree wellness in all corners and aspects of your life. entry.title: Deep-Sea Fish Oil 60 Softgels & True Vitamin Adults 40+ 45 Tablets Combo
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Multivitamin Tablets
Price: 1148.00

Modern lifestyle has brought, in abundance, changes in our lives that seem normal when we are in our youth. But most of these changes start posing seriously when a person reaches their 40s. Effective steps taken at this stage of a person’s life can be greatly beneficial for their health later in life; and it is exactly why we bring to you neuherbs Deep Sea Omega &  True Multivitamin Adults 40+ tablets combination, specifically designed for people above the age of 40. neuherbs True Multivitamin Adults 40+ tablets are created with 13 vitamins, 9 minerals, and one of its kind herbal blends serving various purposes for our body’s optimal functioning. Particularly catering to the heart, immunity, and bones the combo also brings to you the goodness of neuherbs Deep Sea Omega Fish Oil soft gels that contain triple strength Omega- 3 Fatty Acid, procured from the best quality deep sea fish oil to better manage your heart health, muscle function, memory & bone health. Available in lemon flavour, it is a one of its kind Omega supplement as this helps with fishy aftertaste or helps avoid fishy burps after taking the supplement. So, buy Deep Sea Omega Fish Oil soft gels alongside True Multivitamin for Adults 40+ in the unique combination brought to you by neuherbs and provide your body with the antioxidants that it needs and manage your bone and joint health effectively.

entry.title: True Vitamin Wellness Combo for Women & Adults 40+
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: adult and women combo
Price: 798.00

Nutritional needs are bound to change for individuals at different stages of their lives. A man will have different needs from a woman, a 20 year old will have different nutritional needs from a 40 year old. While some nutritions are consistently required in humans, multivitamins need to cater to the specific needs of people. To target this very need, neuherbs bring to you our True Multivitamin Adults 40+ and True vitamin Women combo —- to help you address daily nutritional gaps at different stages of life. True Vitamin Women multivitamin tablets for women help with reproductive health, their hair, skin or bone health and helps them maintain high energy levels throughout their day. On the other hand, multivitamins for adults above 40 are formulated using natural herbs & other ingredients rich in vitamins, minerals, along with probiotics & digestive enzymes to support bone health, digestion and energy metabolism within the body. Both of these supplement show our wide variety of products and dedication in bringing wellness to you, while also proving to be a valuable addition to your daily balanced diets.

entry.title: Plant-Based True Vitamin B12 Tablets For Energy & Brain
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True B12 Vitamin
Price: 275.00 - 549.00 (2 variants)

Vitamin B12 deficiency can lead to tiredness, muscle soreness, muscle cramps, uninvited fatigue, depression, and even mood swings. Vitamin B12 supplements are best for vegans & vegetarians that may promote better circulation, improve concentration and memory, keep the mind calm, promote nerve health, reduce tiredness, improve energy levels, and boost metabolic processes. It's the best Vitamin B12 supplement which consists of natural Vitamin B12 derived from spirulina to help you fulfill your daily Vitamin B12 needs. True B12 Vitamin tablet for men and women with Myo-Inositol which help promote better absorption that help maintain optimal brain functioning, reduce stress & anxiety and is a good mood enhancer. In addition, neuherbs True B12 Vitamin also contains folic acid and the goodness of Punarnava. Punarnava is best known for its rejuvenating properties that help the body recover oxidative stress and rejuvenate the body from within.

entry.title: True Magnesium Tablets - Relax Muscles & Mind, Support Bones
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: True Magnesium
Price: 399.00 - 699.00 (2 variants)

Magnesium is essential for proper heart function, energy production, hormonal balance, and muscle function. It is essentially known as the “Miracle Mineral” because of its versatile benefits. It also helps our body absorb Vitamin D3 better, promotes healthy nervous function, improves bone health, calms the mind, regulates insulin production, and keeps the body energized throughout the day. neuherbs True Magnesium is a high strength formula that contains 1600 mg of magnesium, that is uniquely paired with Zinc, Vitamin C, antioxidants like Blueberry, and Bilberry for maximum benefits. True Magnesium is created to fulfil your body’s daily magnesium needs. True Magnesium supplement contains 353mg of elemental Magnesium Bisglycinate in a more bioavailable form which is gentle on stomach. It effectively contributes to keeping the muscle relaxed, helps improve energy levels, promote sound sleep, calms the mind, fights free-radical damage, improves immunity & promote better muscle recovery.

Type: True Vitamin Adult
Price: 449.00 - 898.00 (2 variants)

True multivitamin tablets offer great digestive benefits due to the presence of digestive enzymes & probiotics content in it, helping you in smooth digestion, better nutrient absorption and happy mood as well. A natural blend of ginseng and L lysine may improve metabolism and overall energy levels considerably. Its herbal blend containing ayurvedic herbs like Brahmi and Bhringraj helps calm the mind, improve focus & mental clarity. neuherbs True Multivitamin Adults 40+ is further enriched with plant-based Vitamin D3 to maintain healthy bones & maximize well-being.

entry.title: True Calcium Tablets with Plant Vitamin D3 for Stronger Bones
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: true calcium
Price: 299.00 - 598.00 (2 variants)

An amazing 3-in-1 supplement for daily bone and muscle care, neuherbs True Calcium supplement by neuherbs contains 1000 mg of calcium in a more bioavailable Calcium Citrate form, more-bioavailable Vitamin D3, and natural Magnesium. All three vital nutrients work together to maintain strong bones, increase bone density, support muscle, tendon relaxation and contraction, reducing the risk of fractures and brittle bones later in life. True Calcium, the plant-based calcium tablets, help fill the daily calcium gap in adults. Paired with Vitamin D3 it supports better absorption of calcium in the body. Th unique combination of magnesium & calcium in these calcium tablets for bones works synergistically to support muscles contraction, relaxation & improve overall flexibility.

entry.title: Vitamin E Plus Capsules – Skin & Hair Wellness Support
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Vitamin E Plus
Price: 399.00 - 699.00 (2 variants)

Vitamin E is a fat-soluble vitamin and a natural source of antioxidants that support overall wellness. neuherbs Vitamin E Plus capsules are plant-based and sourced from sunflower oil, enriched with almond oil and MCT oil (medium chain triglycerides) for optimal absorption.

 This formula is designed to support healthy skin and hair as part of a balanced wellness routine. It provides a combination of natural vitamin E and supportive nutrients to help maintain skin hydration, promote antioxidant protection, and contribute to overall hair and skin wellness.

neuherbs Vitamin E Plus is a 3-in-1 supportive formula for skin and hair health, designed for everyday wellness.

entry.title: Neuherbs Hair Vitamins Tablets
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Hair Skin Vitamins
Price: 699.00 - 1328.00 (2 variants)

Daily exposure to pollution, stress, and an unhealthy diet can weaken hair from the roots, leading to dull, dry, thin hair with easy breakage. The good news? These are modifiable factors—and with the right nutrition, you can restore your hair strength and vitality. neuherbs Hair Vitamins Tablets for Hair Nourishment offer a complete solution for stronger, healthier, and more voluminous hair. This one-a-day hair vitamin formula combines 3 Clinically-Backed Blends including daily nourishment blend combining 15 essential vitamins and minerals—Biotin, natural Vitamin C, Zinc, and Iron—to bridge nutritional gaps, reduce oxidative stress, and repair hair follicles from within. Powered by the amino acids—featuring L-Lysine, L-Cysteine, L-Methionine (crucial for hair structure) and time-tested herbs like Amla, Rosemary, and Hibiscus extracts—they support keratin synthesis to strengthen hair strands, reduce hair greying, and promote thicker hair. Unlike typical hair supplements that focus only on hair fall, these biotin tablets provide comprehensive nourishment, repair, and strength, delivering 100% RDA of Biotin for visible volume and shine. To ensure maximum efficacy, neuherbs hair vitamin tablets include piperine from black pepper, which enhances nutrient absorption and bioavailability. Whether you're dealing with hair thinning, breakage, or simply wanting to boost your hair health, these tablets support your journey to healthier hair from the inside out.

entry.title: Neuherbs True Vitamin Daily Tablets
entry.summary:
Vendor: Neuherbs
Type: Multivitamin Tablets
Price: 399.00 - 798.00 (2 variants)

Does the diet you are taking are full of vitamins, minerals, healthy fats & antioxidants? And if yes, does it get properly absorbed by your body? Do you still feel lethargic after eating healthy food? The answer to all these questions is fulfilment of daily nutritional needs with appropriate absorption. And it is not an easy task. But including a multivitamin into the daily diet can help. Neuherbs True Vitamin Daily multivitamin tablet is formulated with 22 key ingredients which are validated by science to provide various health benefits. Neuherbs Multivitamin is a solution for today’s unhealthy habits of binging on fast food that only offers empty calories & zero nutrition. We designed this formula of Multivitamin (Vitamin A, E, C, D & B complex) Multimineral (Zinc, Magnesium, Copper, Selenium,) along with ginseng and antioxidant from Grape Seed extract (95% Proanthocyanins) to help you provide overall strength, stamina, enhanced immunity, support heart, brain health and improve quality of life.
